register.meta.title: Register - Mingrun Tech
register.heroTitle: Create your account and enter the console directly.
register.heroSummary: A default workspace is created automatically so assistants, memory, chat, and model tools start in one place.
register.point0.label: Projects
register.point0.detail: Organize work by business line or experiment.
register.point1.label: Datasets
register.point2.label: Model registry
register.point2.detail: Publish aliases and keep rollback paths.

register.helper: We'll send a verification code to your email after you fill in the form.
register.displayName.label: Display name
register.email.label: Email
register.password.label: Password
register.confirmPassword.label: Confirm password
register.verifyHelper: A verification code has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.

reset.meta.title: Reset Password - Mingrun Tech
reset.heroTitle: Reset your password via email verification.
reset.heroSummary: We'll send a verification code to your registered email. After verification, you can set a new password.
reset.point0.label: Secure
reset.point0.detail: Code expires in 10 minutes and is single-use.
reset.point1.label: Instant
reset.title: Forgot your password?
reset.helper: Enter the email address you used to register.
reset.email.label: Email
reset.verifyHelper: A verification code has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.
reset.code.label: Verification code
reset.newPassword.label: New password
reset.successSummary: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
reset.successHelper: Please sign in with your new password.
